backend/main.mo: Main actor that manages ICP dashboard data including metrics, user preferences, conversion rates, chart data, price data from multiple API sources, and order book data using OrderedMaps and blob storage with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines old and new actor state types with identical structures and provides a run function to migrate data between actor versions while preserving all OrderedMap data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including candlestick charts with OHLC data, timeframe selectors (15m-1y), metric card toggles with historical charts, data fetching/caching, and professional trading UI styling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend components describing the app structure, dashboard with metric cards, professional candlestick charts, configuration menu, QR code generator, React Query hooks with multi-source API integration, and trading-themed styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets up the page metadata, title 'ICP Economics Dashboard', and mounts the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures QueryClient with 30s stale time and 1min refetch, sets up ThemeProvider, renders Header/Dashboard/ConfigurationMenu, and includes a footer with caffeine.ai attribution and UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationMen: Dialog component with three tabs (General, Logo, QR Code) allowing users to configure custom app name and logo URL (not file upload), with save/reset functionality using React Query mutations and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ConversionRateTa: Displays a scrollable table of historical ICP to Cycles conversion rates with date formatting, trend indicators (up/down arrows with percentage changes), and loading/error states using shadcn UI components.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard component that orchestrates the layout, displaying the ICP price chart, a grid of 7 real-time network metric cards (cycle burn rate, TPS, storage, canister/subnet/node counts), and the conversion rate table with error handling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with customizable app name/logo from user preferences, theme toggle (light/dark mode), live data indicator, and configuration button.
frontend/src/components/ICPPriceChart.ts: Interactive candlestick chart for ICP price data with multiple timeframe options (15m to 1y), zoom functionality, custom candlestick rendering using Recharts, and displays current price, 24h change, market cap, and volume metrics from multiple data sources.
frontend/src/components/LiveDataIndicato: Status indicator component that monitors data freshness and displays a colored dot (green/yellow/red) based on update recency, error state, and number of active data sources.
frontend/src/components/MetricCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying individual network metrics with formatted values, trend indicators, data source labels, and a toggleable historical chart view using the MetricChart component.
frontend/src/components/MetricChart.tsx: Renders an area chart for historical metric data using Recharts, with loading states, error handling, and custom tooltips that format large numbers and timestamps.
A card component that generates QR codes from user-entered URLs using the QR Server API and provides download functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality using DFINITY's AuthClient with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching ICP price data, metrics, and user preferences from multiple APIs (ICPTokens.net, CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, IC Dashboard) with multi-source aggregation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark mode themes, trading dashboard colors, chart styling, and utility animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space (including dashboard and sidebar colors), border radius variables, custom shadows, and keyframe animations for accordions and fade-in effects.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting a crypto trading dashboard with React/TypeScript frontend and Motoko backend, featuring real-time candlestick charts with multiple timeframes (15m-1y) and toggleable historical metric charts using CoinGecko API data.
